Name: Dorper
Description: A hardy meat sheep developed for dry South African conditions and strongly associated with Karoo and inland production regions.

Name: Merino
Description: Fine-wool sheep concentrated in the Cape, Free State and central wool-producing provinces.

Name: Dohne Merino
Description: Dual-purpose sheep with strong roots in Eastern Cape and major wool-and-meat production belts.

Name: Namaqua Afrikaner
Description: An arid-zone fat-tailed breed most closely tied to the western and north-western dryland systems.

Name: Damara
Description: A drought-tolerant sheep suited to extensive and semi-arid grazing areas.
